The second half of the description for 'Wetlands' ('Wildlife Service, National Wetlands Inventory'), which appears at the top of page 2 in the PDF, is used as a header for a new table in the HTML. This disrupts the logical and visual organization of the list.

This results in a table where the first column header is incorrect content and the data rows underneath are misaligned with the header's implied meaning.
